title: Shazu Survival Pack
description: Animated Survival Texture Pack adds smooth, optimized animations to vanilla Minecraft. Clean, survival-friendly visuals.
body:
# Lite Animation Survival Texture Pack

Subtle, performance-friendly animations for **survival essentials** — no block animations included.

Enhances immersion with smooth item, particle, and effect animations while staying true to vanilla Minecraft.

### Key Features
- Animated tools & weapons (idle/swing in hand & inventory)
- Smooth fire, smoke, portal, and particle effects
- Lite & optimized — perfect for long sessions

### Compatibility
- Minecraft **1.20 – 1.21+**
- Vanilla-friendly; works with Sodium/Iris/OptiFine
- Layerable with other packs

### Installation
1. Download .zip
2. Options → Resource Packs → Open Pack Folder
3. Drag in .zip (don't unzip)
4. Activate!

**No entity or block animations — pair with Fresh Animations for mobs!**

Happy surviving! ⛏️✨
